name: Forside Co.,Ltd.
summary: Forside Co.,Ltd., an investment holding company, engages in prize, real estate, and investment banking businesses. It plans, manufactures, and sells prizes for prize games, such as crane game machines, as well as develops, produces, and sells character licensed products and products at event exhibitions; engages in real estate rent guarantee, brokerage and sales, leasing, and management activities; and offers investment banking services. The company also operates and manages Mobibook, an electronic book distribution website that offers various magazines, photobooks, manga, and novels; and Very Good, a media platform. In addition, it engages in the artist training and management works; distribution of live music; and provision of music to corporate commercials. The company was formerly known as SmartEbook.com Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Forside Co., Ltd. in April 2015. Forside Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
